## Protocol checklist

- [ ] SKILL.md follows the format in CONTRIBUTING.md (frontmatter, persona, procedure, output, anti-patterns)
- [ ] Description in frontmatter is under 100 words
- [ ] Tested with at least one realistic scenario
- [ ] Anti-patterns section included (3-5 items)
- [ ] Escape hatches documented (when NOT to use)

## Type of change

- [ ] New protocol
- [ ] Protocol improvement
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
